lines.text: Central Perk, Joey, Chandler, Monica, and Phoebe are there. Joey is holding a deck of cards out to Chandler.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, pick a card.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. (He picks the 9 of Spades)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right now, memorize it. (Pause) You got it?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yes.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (holding up the Queen of Clubs) Is that your card? (He winks and smiles.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (pause) Yes.
Joey laughs then realizes the trick didn't work when Chandler hands him his card back.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: (entering with Ben and Ross) Hey guys!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi there!

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Hi!!

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Guess what? Ben is going to be in a TV commercial!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What are you talking about?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (sets Ben down) Well, it's not for sure but umm, we met this guy in the park who thought Ben was really cute--y'know, which he is--so umm anyhoo, he uh, he gave us his card and told us to bring him down for this commercial he's auditioning.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (reading the card) Whoa! This guy is like the biggest commercial casting director in town! (Ross gasps) Ben takes one lousy walk in the park and gets an audition!! (Ross and Carol stare at him, then Joey realizes what he just said.) I mean, way to go Ben! (Gives Ben the thumbs up, which Ben returns.) Man! I've been in that park a million times and no one offered me an audition.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know, it's crazy! We were just pushing Ben on the swings...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm always on the swings! What am I doing wrong?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That.
Opening Credits
Monica and Rachel's, everyone is eating breakfast, Ross is heading for the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering from her room) Okay, gotta go! Wish me luck!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Luck!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey Rach, now that you're working at Ralph Lauren, can you bring me back some of those polo shirts?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh well, y'know what? I don't think if I feel comfortable stealing on my very first day...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Unwilling to steal from work, interesting.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Besides, if anybody's gonna get free stuff, it's gonna be me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay guys, way to wish me luck!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Good luck! Go get 'em! (Rachel exits.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, let's discuss Rachel's birthday. I say we throw a surprise party this weekend.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa-whoa, but her birthday isn't like for another month.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah but if we throw her a party on her birthday, then it's not a surprise.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I think it's a great idea. Yeah, we could have a dinner party and just invite her close friends.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ross!! We're having a surprise party for Rachel!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (from the bathroom) Okay!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Done.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, great so do you want to do it together?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I would love to do it together!
Joey starts to giggle.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: They're gonna do it together.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Dude! That's my girlfriend!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What, so I gotta shut it down now?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right, I gotta take off. I'm picking up Ben then we're off to the big audition.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's gonna be weird to watch some actor pretending to be Ben's dad.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Weirder than watching his two moms make out? (Monica nods in agreement.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa-whoa dad? There's a dad in the commercial?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah the dad and Ben eat soup and pretend to enjoy it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa, hey, maybe I'll go down there with ya and see if I can get an audition to play the dad. I mean who better to play Ben's father than his godfather.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're not his godfather.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?! Are you kidding?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Pause) Of course I am! (Joey is relieved) Okay, let's go godfather.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right!
As they walk out he motions to Chandler that he is still Ben's godfather.
Ben's audition, Carol, Ross, and Ben along with about 10 more families are in a waiting room as Joey enters happily.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! I'm in, they're gonna let me audition!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Really? That's great!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know! I know! It turns out that one of the casting ladies has actually seen me in a play, so I steered clear of her...

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: (noticing a kid who has picked up a copy of Variety to read) Hey, that kid looks familiar.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah, yeah! He's done tons of commercials. I've seen him in like Sugar Smacks, Playstation, and that one for the phone company. In fact he was so good in that one, he actually convinced me to switch phone companies. Chandler was mad....

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah well, he's not gonna get this one. Ben is way cuter than that kid. I mean look at him, look at you, (Starts to whine like a baby and Joey just glares at him.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's great. Listen, wouldn't it be great though if I got to play Ben's dad?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey, you look nothing like Ben.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I look more like him than you do! (He winks at Carol.)

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Y'know, I don't really know you well enough for you to do that.
Rachel's new job, she's in her new boss's office (Kim's) and with the other assistant (Nancy). Together they're deciding what clothes to buy or something, who knows, let's all watch/read to find out.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: So it's down to these two, Nancy I know you like this one and I think I agree. Rachel, what do you think?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well umm, that one is pretty but uh, I just, I just love this fabric (On the other one.) Sorry.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: Oh don't be sorry, that's part of your job here to give your opinions and then I take credit for them--I'm kidding.

lines.speaker: Nancy
lines.text: She is kidding, but don't ever disagree with her again. Okay, now I'm kidding!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (laughing nervously) Oh, what a fun office.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: I don't know which one, but I do know I need a cigarette. So what do you say we take a break, we go outside, and we'll figure this out when we come back?
They all get up to leave.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: (at the door) Rachel? Do you smoke?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no, my dad's a doctor and he would always tell me just horror stories...(stops and tries to change directions)...about ghosts and goblins who totally supported the princess's right to smoke.
Monica and Rachel's, Rachel is telling Chandler and Monica about her day.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: ...and then they came back from smoking and they had made all of the decisions without me!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That doesn't seem fair.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know! It's like I'm being punished for not having this disgusting, poisoning habit!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, it is the best.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I mean what if this keeps happening? Y'know, they'll-they'll be outside smoking, making all the decisions and I'll just be up in my office breathing my stupid clean air, y'know? And then when the day comes when Kim wants to promote one of us, who do you think she's gonna pick? Me or Smokey Smokerson?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rachel, you can go down there, you don't have to smoke. Just say you wanna get some fresh air.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I can do that.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, or you can do the easy thing and smoke.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey Rach, you wanna get some coffee?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I would love to!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh good!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I wanna go to babe.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh good.
They all start out.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh wait, I change my mind! (She slams the door on them.) Okay, let's talk about the party! I have so many ideas! (Holds up a cocktail napkin.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, me too! (Runs and grabs her 3-ring binder of ideas.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, look at that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, that's a little sketch of the cake, umm some sample menus, umm y'know what I thought we would start out with Tuscan style finger food, and for music, here's an alphabetized list of all my CDs! I've highlighted the ones that would go really good with the food.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What happened to the intimate dinner party?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, we're not doing that. Okay...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So wow, it looks like you took care of everything. Thanks a lot, co-host.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?! I didn't take care of everything, there's-there's plenty of things for you to do!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Thinks) Cups.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Cups? You're giving me cups?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And ice!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Cups and ice? Ooh, I get to be in charge of cups and ice? (Thinks of something) All right. Fine, okay, I will be in charge of cups and ice!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait a minute, I can get ice at the restaurant...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I got it! Mine!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering, downtrodden) Hi.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! How'd the audition go?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Not so good.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait a minute, are you doing Joey's (sadly) "Audition didn't go so well. (Happily) Yeah it did?"

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Pause) Yeah I am! Yeah, Ben got a second audition!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (also downtrodden) Yeah, I had to teach Ross my bit because I actually didn't get a callback.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You got a callback too didn't you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (Happily) Yeah I did!
The smoker's balcony, Rachel is out to join Kim and Nancy.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: Hey Rachel, what are you doing out here?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh well, it's kinda lonely up there, so I just thought I would come out here and get some fresh air.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: Nancy and I were talking about the fall collection.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh great!

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: So anyway we really... (Someone exhales and Rachel turns and coughs.) Honey, we're just smoking all over you.

lines.speaker: Nancy
lines.text: Oh, sorry!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh that's okay.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: No-no-no, we'll move you just stay right there. (They walk away.)

lines.speaker: Nancy
lines.text: So anyway I sent the designs over to Ralph and he's very excited about the line.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: Oh that's great! You are the best!
Rachel gets fed up and heads over to another smoker.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Excuse me, can I, can I bum one of those? (He holds up his pack.) Y'know what, actually... (She takes the one he's smoking and heads over to where Nancy and Kim are standing and laughing.) Okay, okay, okay, what's so funny over here?

lines.speaker: Nancy
lines.text: I thought you didn't smoke.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I thought you guys meant marijuana cigarettes, y'know? Y'know what I mean, like dubbies? And I actually, I thought to myself, "Wow, those guys are crazy!" But no, I actually smoke the regular ones all, all the time.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: We get high.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, me too.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: I'm kidding.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Laughs) Oh, me too.
Ben and Joey's (Isn't that an ice cream??) callback.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh God, this is so nerve wracking! How-how do you do this?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, unfortunately, I don't get many callbacks so...

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Is it a good sign that they asked us to hang around after the audition?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Who knows?

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: (entering) Okay uh, we have narrowed it down to Raymond, Ben, Kyle, and Joey. The rest of you, thank you very much.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes!! I knew it!! (To the people who didn't make it.) Bye-bye! So long! Later!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh this is great! I might actually get to play Ben's dad!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Actually, that can't happen. Yeah because you all have such different looks, we're putting you with Raymond and Kyle with Ben. So it'll be either you two (Points to Joey and Raymond) or you two. (Points to Kyle and Ben.) (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Man, this is gonna be kinda weird.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, it is.

lines.speaker: Kyle
lines.text: Yeah. It's gonna be weird.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, we-we're gonna be like best friends, that's why it's gonna be weird.

lines.speaker: Kyle
lines.text: Oh, oh, I thought we were just talking.
Commercial Break
Chandler and Joey's, Ross and Chandler are talking.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering, carrying two garbage bags) Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross and Chandler
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Is it okay if I leave this stuff here 'til Rachel's birthday party?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ah sure. What's in 'em?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Umm, cups.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh good, because uh we got Rachel 800 gallons of water.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Seriously that's a lot of cups.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah well, that's 'cause Monica put me in charge of cups and ice, and Monica is gonna rue the day that she put me in charge of cups and ice.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know I rued the day once...didn't get a whole lot else done.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, time to bring up the rest of the cups. (She goes and opens the door to Joey.) Oh, hi Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Pheebs! (To the guys) Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ross good, I'm uh glad you're here. I wanna talk to you about something.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What's up?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I've been thinking about this whole commercial thing, y'know me going up against Ben, the two of us competing, and that can't lead to anything good. So, I think I'm just gonna step aside. I'm gonna tell them that I won't audition.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow, uh, Joey that's-that's great. Thanks man.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's it? You're-you're gonna let me do this?! This-this is my career we're talking about here!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, you just...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I just said that so you wouldn't let Ben do it! Look Ross, if anyone should step aside it should be Ben!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What? Chandler! Tell 'em!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (shocked) Well I mean, let me get the door first. (Goes and opens the door.) Oh, hi! No one. (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why should Ben step aside? It was his audition in the first place! You-you just tagged along! You're like the uh, tag-a-long dad.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: At least I care about his feelings!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Do you know how hard this is gonna be on him when he doesn't get it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And why wouldn't he get it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, come on! Have you seen what my kid can do?! Huh?! I mean he dials phones! He-he-he eats tortilla chips! He-he plays soccer with the cartoon tiger!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Are you saying your kid eats soup better than my kid?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You just give him a spoon baby!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh yeah? I guess we'll just see!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Because this commercial belongs to me and Mitch!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're kid's name is Raymond!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah?! So's yours!
Central Perk, Chandler and Monica are there as Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Rachel) How did work go?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh it was great! It was great! I went down there just like you said, y'know? And we talked business. Kim totally took my opinions.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You stink!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, I'm-I'm serious!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well-well that's 'cause I went down there and they were all smoking. This is actually the smell of success.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, there's something different though--Oh my God! You smoked!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I did not!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes you did! You look happy and sick; you smoked!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, fine! But I had too! I had to do it for my career!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I wish I had smoked for my career...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's so gross!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No well, no it's not that bad, y'know? I mean yeah, my tongue feels a little fuzzy and these fingers sort of smell, I actually feel like I can throw up.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, but you gotta push past this because it is about to get so good!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler! I have to tell you, you smell so smokey I have to get up. I'm not kidding. (She's not; she stands and walks away. Chandler moves closer.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I think you smell great! (He sniffs her shoulder.)
The smoker's balcony, Rachel, Kim, and Nancy are all puffing away on their cancer sticks.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: So, we're decided, no on plaid, yes on pink?

lines.speaker: Nancy
lines.text: Absolutely!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I am so on board! (She throws away her recently lit cigarette.)

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: Rachel didn't you just light that?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I did, but y'know what? I am really, really trying to cut back, y'know? (Laughs) Good luck, Rach.

lines.speaker: Nancy
lines.text: I've actually been thinking about quitting lately.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: Oh sure, every Sunday night I'm telling myself I'm quitting but every Monday morning it's like (Mimics chain smoking.)

lines.speaker: Nancy
lines.text: Tell me about it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well then let's just quit! We'll just quit! Let's all quit!

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: It does sound appealing.

lines.speaker: Nancy
lines.text: Oh, I never could do it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh but you could. You can. Absolutely! We can help each other out! We can get--what are those--those patches! We could be like the Patch Sisters!

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: Oh y'know, we really should quit. Okay, let's quit!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes! Great! Give me those cigs! Give it! Give it! (She grabs their cigarettes and lighters and throws them in the trash.)

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: My late husband gave me that lighter. (Rachel laughs.) I'm not kidding.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay then! (She starts rummaging through the trash to find Kim's lighter.)
Joey and Ben's audition, Joey is rehearsing his lines, uh correction, Joey is rehearsing his line.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hmmm, soup! (Tries again.) Hmm soup! (Tries again, with a little caveman thrown in.) Hmm, soup!

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Joey, Ross is gonna be here any second, would you mind watching Ben for me while I use the ladies' room?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah, no problem.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Thanks. (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (goes over to Ben) Hi Ben! So you wanna be an actor huh? I gotta tell ya, it's no picnic. There's tons of rejection. No stability. One day you're Dr. Drake Remoray, the next day you're eating ketchup right out of the bottle.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering, angrily) Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (angrily) Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (angrily) Ben! (Pause.) (Happily.) I mean, Ben! Ben!

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: (entering) Okay, Raymond, Joey you're up.
Raymond and Joey go in the office.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Okay, uh well, let's try one. Whenever you guys are ready. (Some dude puts down a couple bowls of soup in front of them.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh-oh.

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Is there a problem?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well this is noodle soup and uh, I've been working with tomato. But that's okay, no problem. No problem. Hmm, noodle soup.

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Y'know, that's-that's fine, but the line is, "Hmm, soup."

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, what did I say?

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Hmm, noodle soup.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How's that different? (She looks at him until he gets it.) Oh! Yeah!

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: All right, let's try one.
Raymond and Joey both eat a spoonful and Joey turns to Raymond and says...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hmm, noodle soup.

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Okay. Let's do it again.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay.
They do it again.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hmm, soup. (Pause.) I mean, noodle soup. I mean soup!

lines.speaker: Raymond
lines.text: COME ON!!!!

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Y'know what? We need to move on.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! No! I-I can do it one more time! See? Look! (Eats another spoonful) Hmm, noodle soup. Damnit! (Storms out.)
The smoker's balcony, Kim and Nancy are cheating and are caught by Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey! Hey-hey-hey!!

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: Uh-oh, busted!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Come on you guys! What are doing?! I thought we were the patch sisters!

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: Yeah. That didn't work out.

lines.speaker: Nancy
lines.text: Rachel we tried to quit, but it was too hard!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well y'know if you, if you started smoking again you could've at least told me! Come on, give me one of those! What are we talking about?

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: No. No! You're doing great! Don't you give up! That's why we didn't tell you and we're not gonna drag you down with us.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh wait, no-no-no! Drag me down. Drag-drag me down.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: Forget it Rachel! We're both so proud of how well you're doing. I'm not gonna let you blow it. In fact, if I catch you with a cigarette, you're fired. So go on, get out of here! Go on, I don't want you breathing this stuff! Go on!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. (Starts to walk away.)

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: (to Nancy) So, okay! So you'll come with me on the Paris trip.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (hearing that) Oh man!
Monica and Rachel's, Rachel's surprise party. The apartment is festooned with cups. There are cups everywhere! Cup centerpiece, cup garland, etc., etc

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Chandler) Check it out! Cup hat! (Points to her hat.) Cup banner! Cup chandelier! And the thing that started it all, the cup! (Holds up one.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Great job with the cups, Pheebs!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (overhearing that) Why don't you just go out with her!
Chandler starts to follow her into the kitchen.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (following him) And did you notice the ice? (Gestures to 3 huge buckets of ice on the table.) Look! We have it all! We have crushed! Cubed! And dry! Watch! (Pours some water onto the dry ice, causing it to evaporate/smoke.) Ahhh! Mystical!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Awesome!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler! Everyone--no one's eating my Tuscan finger food 'cause they're all filling up on Phoebe's snow cones!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: There are snow cones! (Monica glares at him.) Snow cones! Yuck!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y'know...go! Go! Right there! (Points)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thank you! Thank you! (Runs to the snow cone machine.)
Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (noticing her) Oh, look! Look! Look!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Surprise!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?! What?! My birthday's not for another month!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's the surprise!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! You guys this is so great! I mean it's so unexpected! I mean Chandler's birthday is even before mine!
Everyone stops and looks at Chandler, who's nodding.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Surprise!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! This is great! Look at all these cups! This is so weird.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I was in charge of cups.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, okay, not so weird.
[Cut to another part of the room, Ross is going to talk to Joey.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Listen man, uh, I'm sorry the audition didn't go so well.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah right! (Gets up for a refill to his snow cone.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No really, I-I am! I feel bad!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah? Well look Ross, you don't have to. Okay? It's not your fault I suck. I mean what kind of an actor can't even say, "Hmm, noodle soup." (Nods his head in disgust.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah y'know what? Maybe-maybe you didn't mess up your audition because you suck, maybe you messed up because you care more about uh, your godson.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What you do mean?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I think, sub-consciously...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wait-whoa-whoa, you lost me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (pause) I think on some level, you-you sabotaged your own audition so that Ben would get the part.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, you're way sounds a lot better than mine. (Thinks about it.) Yeah. Yeah! It's not that I'm a bad actor...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, it's just ah, I care so damn much about little Ben that uh, it was more important to see him succeed.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There you go. Thank you!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thank you! So, did-did he get it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Eh, what are you gonna do?
Ending Credits
The smoker's balcony, Kim and Nancy are out smoking as Chandler sticks his head out the door.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Kim and Nancy) Oh, hi! Excuse me, is uh Rachel Green here? I was supposed to meet her for lunch.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: Oh, she doesn't come down here any more. You can find her up on ten.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, great.
Kim exhales and Chandler stares at it longingly.

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: (to Nancy) So we talked about the (Chandler sneaks closer to her cigarette) whole presentation yesterday at lunch (Closer) and he wondered if one person would be enough (Closer) to get a take on the trip (Still closer) and I said, "Yeah, absolutely!" (She's interrupted by Chandler who has reached his goal and takes a drag from her cancer stick.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'll catch you guys later. (Exits.)
End
